summary: NAS100 broke 30K ATH with bullish HH/HL. 5 consecutive D1 bullish candles. Price in deep PREMIUM - favors pullback entries. Bullish BB flip at 29,100-29,400 confirmed. M15 compression ahead of NY AM.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: D1 BULLISH (HH/HL). 5 consecutive bullish candles. SSL sweep at 28,596 marked low. Dealing Range 27,055-30,215. Price at 30,214 in deep PREMIUM (50% above Fib 50%). Bullish BB flip at 29,100-29,400 confirmed.
ict_analysis.h4_context: H4 Range 28,944-30,215. Price at range high in PREMIUM. Momentum +156 over last 3 bars. CRT: 30,215/30,124. No FVGs. 30,000 flipped to support. Wait for pullback entry.
ict_analysis.m15_status: M15 compression detected (avg range shrinking). Bullish OB at 30,165-30,183. Price breaking M15 highs. NY AM Kill Zone approaching. No reversal pattern yet.

risks.event: Premium zone - poor R/R for chasing

recommendation: GO conditional: Bullish but at ATH in premium. WAIT for pullback to 30,000-30,050 during NY AM Kill Zone for longs. Target 30,300-30,500. SL below 29,900. If 30K fails, expect pullback to 29,750.
weekly_profile: Wednesday - typically forms low during London, expands during NY AM. London session already formed higher lows. Expectation: NY AM drives continuation higher if 30,000 holds.
data_quality: HIGH - MT5 connected, D1/H4/M15 all available
